title: EvangeLIONs rawr
wikitext:
[]: EvangeLIONs , rawr!             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Sat Jul 04, 2009 12:37 pm http://www.sankakucomplex.com/2009/07/04/evangelions/ /discuss

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 04, 2009 12:54 pm Kitties! (Big kitties but still.) Rei is the sister of Shinji? kukuku how fitting. That's cute, though maybe Eva fandom is getting a little too crazy?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat Jul 04, 2009 12:56 pm I've heard of Asuka pussy, but this is rediculous....

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sat Jul 04, 2009 12:59 pm Anno: I feel very honored to have some lions named after some of my most popular characters from show about giant robots fighting monsters. Thank you. Still, its cool.

[]:             Quote Post by BattleMonkey » Sat Jul 04, 2009 1:31 pm Do they combine into Voltron?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Jul 05, 2009 1:34 am Since the Asuka lion is a month younger than the Shinji and Rei lions, I'm assuming that they're not related, so that means we can ship her with the Shinji lion.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Mon Jul 06, 2009 4:17 am who the hell came up with that idea? not that it is a bad idea but still... me likes it!

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Tue Jul 07, 2009 10:43 am Well now I feel slightly less odd for naming my dogs Chidori and Shouta.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jul 07, 2009 1:46 pm They're just copying the trend we set with cats called Kamina and Yamako.

[]:             Quote Post by Hotaru » Fri Jul 10, 2009 7:20 pm Considering the lack of info on Shinji the lion and the fact that Rei is the leader....Shinji is still pathetic--even in kitty form.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jul 11, 2009 1:57 am Kittys! I want an Asuka Lion!
